#= Minimal test fixture for customconstraints parser. =#

using SQLite, JuMP

function build_test_constraint(db::SQLite.DB, jumpmodel::JuMP.Model, quiet::Bool)
    for row in SQLite.DBInterface.execute(db, "select r, y, val from TestTarget__NEMOcc")
        # CO2 mapping for eid=2
        add_to_expression!(sum, 1 * variable_by_name(jumpmodel, "vannualemissions[$r,E2,$y]")) # CO2
        add_to_expression!(sum, 30 * variable_by_name(jumpmodel, "vannualemissions[$r,E4,$y]")) # CH4 using AR5 100-yr GWP
    end
end
